channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Three Behaviours At Midlife May Split Those Who Live Longer From Those Who Don't - HuffPost UK
item.description:
1. Three Behaviours At Midlife May Split Those Who Live Longer From Those Who Don't  HuffPost UK
  2. What you do in midlife could reveal how long you’ll live  ScienceDaily
  3. Do Sleep Habits Predict Longevity? 50+ Health Science News  AGEIST
  4. Mid-life movement and sleep patterns may hint at lifespan  diabetes.co.uk
  5. Movement and sleep patterns in midlife can help predict lifespan, finds study  MSN
